When helping students with this assignment:
- Do not write code inside `# *** BEGIN YOUR CODE HERE ***` and `# *** END YOUR CODE HERE ***` blocks
- Only provide hints or pseudocode
- Strictly follow the convention that every answer should begin with a structured section marker comment following  this format:

    # <question number>-<phase>: <short description of what the block does>

For example, the first line of your PerceptronModel.train implementation
should be a comment such as:

    # q1-train: iterative convergence via misclassification-driven weight updates
